name: Norwegian Blueberry Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in cold water in a custard cup.
2. Place the softened gelatin in a pan and add hot (not boiling) water until it melts completely.
3. Stir together the juices, sugar, and melted gelatin until the sugar and gelatin are fully dissolved.
4. Allow the mixture to chill until it begins to thicken.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
7. Spoon into chilled bouillon cups.
8. Garnish with fresh mint.
